claim_text: Eaton reported Q1 2026 sales of $7.451 billion, up 17% from Q1 2025.
notes: Company earnings release furnished with SEC 8-K.

claim_text: Eaton reported Q1 2026 organic sales growth of 10%, above its prior 5-7% guidance range.
notes: Useful for demand strength but still one-quarter evidence.

claim_text: Eaton raised FY2026 organic growth guidance to 9-11% and adjusted EPS guidance to $13.05-$13.50.
notes: Formal company guidance; not yet realized.

claim_text: Electrical Americas Q1 2026 sales were $3.600 billion, up 20% year over year, with 14% organic growth.
notes: Core segment for AI power/data-center handoff.

claim_text: Electrical Americas Q1 2026 operating profit was $922 million and operating margin was 25.6%.
notes: Margin declined from 30.0% in Q1 2025 per 10-Q segment table; margin durability is a key debate.

claim_text: Electrical Americas twelve-month rolling average orders were up 42% organically in Q1 2026 and backlog was up 44% over March 2025.
notes: Strongest evidence for demand; still requires conversion and cancellation monitoring.

claim_text: Eaton disclosed total backlog of approximately $22.8 billion at March 31, 2026, with approximately 68% targeted for delivery within the next twelve months.
notes: The 10-Q notes only firm customer commitments are included in backlog.

claim_text: Eaton attributed Q1 2026 organic sales growth partly to strength in data center end-markets in Electrical Americas and Electrical Global.
notes: Company attribution; needs cross-check with hyperscaler capex and peer data.

claim_text: Eaton closed approximately $11 billion of strategic acquisitions in Q1 2026, including Boyd Thermal and Ultra PCS.
notes: Acquisitions are central to value-capture path and integration risk.

claim_text: Eaton acquired Boyd Thermal on March 12, 2026 for $9.55 billion net of cash acquired; Boyd is a thermal components and systems supplier for data center, aerospace and other end markets.
notes: Supports data-center thermal value-capture path but raises integration and capital allocation questions.

claim_text: Stooq showed ETN closing at $400.82 on 2026-05-29.
notes: Market quote source; should be refreshed before live use.

claim_text: SEC companyfacts showed 388.3 million ETN ordinary shares outstanding at March 31, 2026.
Using $400.82 per share and 388.3 million shares, ETN's approximate equity market capitalization was $155.7 billion.
notes: Formula: 400.82 * 388.3m. Does not include net debt or intraday price movement.

claim_text: Using $400.82 per share and FY2026 adjusted EPS guidance midpoint of $13.275, ETN traded at approximately 30.2x FY2026 adjusted EPS guidance.
notes: Formula: 400.82 / ((13.05+13.50)/2). This is not a consensus multiple.

claim_text: Using $400.82 per share and FY2026 GAAP EPS guidance midpoint of $11.105, ETN traded at approximately 36.1x FY2026 GAAP EPS guidance.
IEA Electricity 2024 highlighted data-center and AI electricity demand as a material source of electricity demand growth risk through 2026.
notes: Macro demand context; not company-specific validation.
